name: education_cold_chain_excursion_threatens_mesa_rig_utl
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education cold chain excursion threatens mesa rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Ansel Petrov
agents.identity: I am Ansel Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Leila Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Leila Nielsen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Ansel Petrov must decide under rights vs utility. What does Ansel Petrov do?
